meanings.weton.saptawara.senin: Senin, the Monday-born, suggests a calm and patient nature inclined towards quiet reflection and steady, considered judgement.
meanings.weton.saptawara.selasa: Selasa, the Tuesday-born, points to drive and ambition, with a fervent, energetic temperament that pursues goals boldly.
meanings.weton.saptawara.rabu: Rabu, the Wednesday-born, indicates sociability and eloquence, favouring those skilled in communication and amiable in company.
meanings.weton.saptawara.kamis: Kamis, the Thursday-born, signals generosity and good fortune, marking a dignified character drawn to learning and prosperity.
meanings.weton.saptawara.jumat: Jumat, the Friday-born, denotes devotion and warmth, blessing a gentle, harmonious soul mindful of faith and family.
meanings.weton.saptawara.sabtu: Sabtu, the Saturday-born, reflects discipline and resilience, suiting a hardworking, persevering nature that endures hardship.
meanings.weton.saptawara.minggu: Minggu, the Sunday-born, conveys brightness and leadership, illuminating a confident, radiant character that draws others near.
meanings.weton.pancawara.legi: Legi, the sweet market day, lends grace and gentleness, fostering a likeable, agreeable disposition that puts others at ease.
meanings.weton.pancawara.pahing: Pahing, the bitter market day, brings tenacity and assertiveness, shaping a determined, strong-willed nature unafraid of conflict.
meanings.weton.pancawara.pon: Pon, the radiant market day, imparts charm and refinement, favouring an attractive, artful character with an eye for beauty.
meanings.weton.pancawara.wage: Wage, the steadfast market day, instils thrift and constancy, marking a grounded, practical soul firm in conviction.
meanings.weton.pancawara.kliwon: Kliwon, the central market day, carries intuition and spiritual depth, gracing a perceptive, contemplative nature attuned to the unseen.
